description: Complete test vectors for PKD specification. Includes both acceptance tests and rejection tests for all 10 actions.

step-field-semantics.merkle-root-before: Merkle root before processing this step
step-field-semantics.merkle-root-after: Merkle root after acceptance; equals merkle-root-before if rejected
step-field-semantics.expect-fail: If true, this step MUST be rejected
step-field-semantics.protocol-message: Transmitted protocol JSON (includes symmetric keys for encrypted fields; RevokeKeyThirdParty is minimal plaintext)
step-field-semantics.signed-message: Protocol message with ML-DSA-44 signature (empty for RevokeKeyThirdParty)
step-field-semantics.hpke-wrapped-message: Signed message with padding, X-Wing HPKE-encrypted (empty for plaintext actions)
step-field-semantics.merkle-leaf: Data committed to Merkle tree: hash || server_sig || server_pk_hash (computed from the Merkle payload JSON)
step-field-semantics.expected-error: Error description (only present when expect-fail is true)

steps.expected-error: Self-signed AddKey not allowed when keys exist
Operator and target domains must match
Cannot revoke the last remaining key
